retrieved_result: Lutefisk To Sausage: Stocking Up On Holiday Meats MINNEAPOLIS (WCCO) — Any true Minnesotan with an ounce of Viking blood knows that 16th and Lake Street in Minneapolis is their final stop before the Christmas feast. For the past 90 years, the south Minneapolis street corner has been anchored by Ingebretsen’s meat market and gift shop.“Christmas ite"
